prompt: Tap small blind seat before covering-versus-covered action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before tournament-pressure decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The small blind is the right seat anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the out-of-position blind who feels the pressure first.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The small blind is the target seat anchor because this covered-pressure branch must stay tied to the partly committed blind seat.
